overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in white hooded robes walking through a medieval gothic castle corridor. The character passes by suits of armor, a large house crest banner, and encounters another robed figure before proceeding through a wrought iron archway into a narrower corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle entrance hall with house crest display

events.description: character turns left to follow the corridor direction, revealing tall windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the castle entrance hall, turning left to follow the corridor lined with tall gothic windows

entered.detail: large blue and gold banner with letter H hanging on the stone wall
grey stone block wall with mounted deer head and tapestries
tall arched windows with diamond panes letting in natural morning light
full plate armor suits standing against the wall
decorative iron gate marking the entrance to the next corridor section

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic castle hall, passing a large house crest banner on the wall. The camera turns left to follow the corridor, revealing tall windows on the left and suits of armor lining the right wall. Natural light streams through the windows mixing with warm torchlight.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor, approaching and passing a student in dark robes walking the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the camera then passing by on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the corridor, now passing by the suits of armor at closer range. An NPC in dark school robes approaches from the opposite direction and passes by on the right. The wrought iron archway ahead grows larger as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow gated corridor with helmet displays

events.description: passing through the wrought iron archway into a narrower, more enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the decorative iron gate into a more confined stone corridor with dimmer lighting

entered.detail: wooden display stand holding two metal helmets with red and blue plumes
confined hallway with rough stone walls and smaller windows

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through the wrought iron archway, transitioning from the wide hall into a narrower corridor. The natural light from the tall windows disappears, replaced by wall sconces. A display stand with plumed helmets appears on the right as the character continues into the more enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a spacious gothic castle hall that gradually transitions into a narrower, more enclosed corridor. It begins by following a character in white robes past a large house crest banner, turning left to reveal a corridor where natural light from tall windows blends with warm torchlight and suits of armor line the walls. As the character advances, the camera closes the distance to the armor while a figure in dark school robes passes by from the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the character moves through a wrought iron archway, causing the wide hall to give way to a tighter passage. Finally, the natural light disappears, replaced by the glow of wall sconces as the camera passes a display of plumed helmets and continues deeper into the restricted space.
